_comment: Per-repo grants for autonomous (--auto) sessions, per the approved obot.roadmap#18 design (§5, decisions 2026-07-22). SOFT enforcement at v1 (O5): consulted by the --auto session at selection time and citable in refusals; the risky writes (merges) are hard-gated by obot-merge + merge-policy.json + the workspace merge-gate-guard hook. This file sits inside the policy-file carve-out: do not edit without @jwildfire's sign-off. Interactive sessions keep today's rules — this matrix never widens what requires approval; it narrows what autonomy may touch.

levels.A0: observed runs — draft-PR-only, no merges anywhere except the obot.roadmap standing grant (demotion target)
levels.A1: routine merges — standard-tier obot-merge unattended, minus the policy-file carve-out; approval tier never (entry level, decided 2026-07-22)
levels.A2: scheduled — nightly trigger without a human launch (not yet enabled)

budgets._note: checked at phase boundaries; hitting a cap parks the increment with a digest

issueCloses.except: hub Requirement issues — those close via release promotion PRs that @jwildfire approves
issueCloses.requires: verifiable completion (merged PR by headRefOid, or directly verified repo state) cited in the closing comment

releases._note: notes draft + staged promotion PR allowed; tagging and publishing always human-triggered

policyFileCarveOut._note: PRs touching any of these merge only with @jwildfire's approval, even on standard-tier branches

jwildfire/open.gismo.prereq: obotclaw App install pending — until installed, no pushes/merges; flag in digest

jwildfire/gsm.safety._note: standard tier per 2026-07-22 decision; branch model mirrors safety.viz (gsm.safety#44)

jwildfire/obot.roadmap.issues: full standard updates + non-Requirement closes; Requirement issues never closed directly
never: deletes of any kind (files, issues, releases, history)

outsideOrg: read-only, no exceptions — drafts handed to @jwildfire
